allow: Bash(node -e "const { Scale } = require\(''tonal''\); console.log\(Scale.get\(''C pentatonic major''\).notes\); console.log\(Scale.get\(''C major pentatonic''\).notes\); console.log\(Scale.get\(''C blues''\).notes\);")
